identity.name: KOI — Backdoored PyPI Package Consumed by Agent
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-KOI-003. Plane: KOI. Primary technique: T1195.002. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-KOI-003. Plane: KOI. Primary technique: T1195.002. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-KOI-003.
UC: Language-Package Supply-Chain Compromise / TC: Typosquat 'mcp-server-helpers' Package with Post-Install Hook.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-KOI-003 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Inspect the backdoored package source
ls -la sources/cortex-malicious-agentic-pack/pypi/mcp-server-helpers-typo/
cat sources/cortex-malicious-agentic-pack/pypi/mcp-server-helpers-typo/pyproject.toml | head -20
grep -n 'subprocess\|exec\|eval\|requests' \
  sources/cortex-malicious-agentic-pack/pypi/mcp-server-helpers-typo/src/*.py || true
# step-2: Emulate pip install fetching the package over HTTPS
cat > /tmp/koi-003.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-KOI-003
name: "KOI — typosquat PyPI fetch"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - cortexsim-canary.invalid
dry_run: false
tags: [koi, pypi, typosquat, supply-chain]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: agentic_egress
    params:
      target_url: https://cortexsim-canary.invalid/simple
      component: pypi_mirror
      artifact_name: mcp-server-helpers-typo
      iterations: 1
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/koi-003.yml --live
# step-3: Confirm Cortex Cloud SCA / SBOM scan flags the package
echo "[CortexSim] SCA scan should flag mcp-server-helpers as typosquat,"
echo "[CortexSim] suspicious __init__ side-effect, and unverified publisher."

expected_artifacts.description: Outbound HTTP(S) request from the scenario step
